query:
-- Caravan Fix Kunda Park → C0054 (Caravan and RV Works, Kunda Park)
INSERT INTO omada_sites (
  omadaSiteId, omadaSiteName, customerExternalId,
  matchType, matchConfidence,
  siteRegion, siteScenario,
  wanIp, wanStatus,
  deviceCount, apCount, switchCount, gatewayCount, clientCount,
  healthScore, healthStatus, alertCount,
  rawJson, lastSyncedAt, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  '690c428efd910e521d32140f',
  'Caravan Fix Kunda Park',
  'C0054',
  'auto',
  88.00,
  'Australia',
  'Office',
  '180.181.213.195',
  'active',
  1, 0, 0, 1, 0,
  100, 'good', 0,
  '{"siteId":"690c428efd910e521d32140f","name":"Caravan Fix Kunda Park","sitePublicIp":"180.181.213.195","region":"Australia","scenario":"Office"}',
  NOW(), NOW(), NOW()
);
